about.title: about
about.description: recps.app is a recipe search app that helps you find meals based on what you have. Search by name, filter by ingredients you want to include, or exclude ones you'd rather avoid.

searchResultDisplay.conflictingIngredients:
due to conflicting ingredients!
an ingredient cannot be part of included and excluded at the same time!

markedRecipes.title: marked recipes
markedRecipes.empty: no marked recipes yet. open the recipe browser and mark some recipes to get started.

menuEditor.moveTip: tap a day column to move it there
menuEditor.placeTip: tap a day column to place it
menuEditor.infoTip: select a recipe from the pool, then tap a day column to place it
menuEditor.nameTooShort: name must be at least 2 characters.
menuEditor.nameTooLong: name must be at most 250 characters.

recipeCollections.title: collections
recipeCollections.loginNeeded: you need to be logged in to view your recipe collections.
recipeCollections.empty: no collections yet. create one to get started!
recipeCollections.deleteModalQuestion: are you sure you want to delete
recipeCollections.noMarkedRecipes: no marked recipes. browse recipes and mark some first.
recipeCollections.markedAlreadyAdded: all marked recipes are already in this collection.
